meaning: and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)
he gives life (connected to وَيُمِيتُ - and causes death)
and he causes to die (connected to يُحْىِۦ - gives life)
And The Last (as a name/attribute of Allah)
And The Apparent One (one of Allah's names)
and The Hidden One (one of Allah's names)
he (refers to Allah in this ayah)
The one who/which/that (refers to هُوَ - He)
and the earth (as object of خَلَقَ/created)
in/within/inside (shows what enters into الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
he became established/settled (on عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ - upon the throne)
he enters/penetrates (subject of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
he goes out/exits (happening now or in future)
he ascends/is ascending (describing what goes up to السَّمَآءِ)
in it/her (referring to الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
and he (subject of مَعَكُمْ - with you)
where (asking about location of كُنتُمْ - you were)
and Allah (as the subject of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
you all work/act/do (referring to the people being addressed in this ayah)
surely for him/belongs to him (owner of مُلْكُ)
and the earth (being described with السَّمٰوٰتِ)
he causes to enter (the subject of this verb is Allah)
the night (object of يُولِجُ - He merges)
in (connecting فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ - in the day)
from what (of جَعَلَكُم - what He made you)
he made you all (into مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ - successors/trustees)
those who were made successors (of what others possessed)
in it (referring to what Allah made you stewards over)
for/to you all (addressing the disbelievers who don't believe)
he calls/invites you all (to believe in your Lord)
by your (all of you) master/lord (object of تُؤْمِنُونَ - you believe)
you all were (referring to those being addressed in وَمَا لَكُمْ)
He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
The one who/which - connects descriptions to what's being described
he sends down repeatedly (subject of هُوَ ٱلَّذِى)
so that he brings you all out (of الظُّلُمٰتِ/darkness)
with/to you all (referring to those being brought out of darkness)
that not (connected to تُنفِقُوا - you spend)
in/within (connects سَبِيلِ with what comes before)
from you all (referring to those being addressed about spending)
and he engaged in mutual combat (with others)
greater/more magnificent (than those who came after)
those who (referring to those who spent and fought mentioned in the ayah)
and Allah (as the subject of خَبِيرٌ - is All-Aware)
you (all) work/are working (describing what Allah knows about in بِمَا)
someone who knows deeply (about what تَعْمَلُونَ you do)
who (asking about the person who will lend to اللَّهَ)
this (referring to قَرْضًا حَسَنًا - a good loan)
the one who (connects to يُقْرِضُ - lends)
he lends (subject of الَّذِى - the one who)
Allah (as the object of يُقْرِضُ - lends to)
so he multiplies it (in response to يُقْرِضُ)
on the day when (object of تَرَى - you will see)
the believers (who يَسْعَىٰ their light runs)
and the believing women (object of تَرَى/you see)
under it/beneath it (referring to جَنَّاتٌ - gardens)
those who stay forever (describes المؤمنين والمؤمنات - the believing men and women)
that (referring to the great success mentioned after)
The Most Great (a name/attribute of اللَّهِ)
let us get (some of your light)
it was said (in response to نَقْتَبِسْ - let us take)
a light (object of نَقْتَبِسْ - we seek to acquire)
then it was set up (connecting to قِيلَ ٱرْجِعُوا۟)
between them (separating the believers from the hypocrites)
a door (belonging to the wall mentioned before)
in it (referring to the wall/barrier with a gate mentioned)
from its direction (referring to العَذَابُ - the punishment)
we were (negated by لَمْ before it)
they said (responding to يُنَادُونَهُمْ - they call them)
and she (false hopes) deceived you all completely
and deceived you all greatly (connected to وَتَرَبَّصْتُمْ before it)
the constant deceiver (subject of غَرَّكُم - deceived you)
so today (when no ransom will be accepted)
those who (plural, referring to كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
your (plural) place of shelter (subject of هِىَ)
the fire (subject of مَأْوَىٰكُمُ - your refuge)
and how evil! (describing مَأْوَىٰكُمُ - your refuge)
the final destination (subject of بِئْسَ - what an evil)
that it becomes humble (subject: قُلُوبُهُمْ - their hearts)
their hearts (as the doers of قَسَتْ/hardened)
they were given (refers to الَّذِينَ - those who)
from (connecting ٱلْحَقِّ to what comes after)
so it became long (connected to قَسَتْ - their hearts hardened)
the time period (subject of طَالَ - became long)
and then it (their hearts) hardened (referring to قُلُوبُهُمْ)
from them (referring to those who were given the Book)
those who break away from obedience (plural)
Allah (as the object of اعْلَمُوٓا۟ - know)
the signs (object of بَيَّنَّا - we have made clear)
perhaps you all, so that you all (subject of تَعْقِلُونَ)
you all use reason (addressing the believers in this ayah)
the men who give charity (acted on)
and the women who give charity (acted on)
and they gave a loan (subject of يُضٰعَفُ)
Allah (as the object of أَقْرَضُوا۟ - they lent)
a loan (object of أَقْرَضُوا - they lent)
those (far away, pointing to the disbelievers mentioned)
for/to them (referring to الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا - those who believed)
the worldly life (contrasted with ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ - the hereafter)
the intense rejecters of truth (object of أَعْجَبَ)
it becomes dried up (describing نَبَاتُهُۥ - its growth/vegetation)
turned intensely yellow (object of فَتَرَىٰهُ - then you see it)
then (after a delay) (connects نَبَاتُهُۥ with يَهِيجُ)
and in (connects to الْءَاخِرَةِ - the Hereafter)
like the width of (possessed by السَّمَاء)
and the earth (being compared to Paradise's width)
And Allah (as the subject of يُؤْتِيهِ - He gives)
owner of, possessor of (describes فَضْلُ - bounty)
from (connects كِتٰبٍ to what comes after it)
before (of أَن نَّبْرَأَهَآ - that We create it)
that (connects to نَّبْرَأَهَآ - we create it)
indeed we create it (referring to مُّصِيبَةٍ - calamity)
what (referring to what has escaped/passed you)
it passed you all (referring to what escaped from مَا)
you all rejoice/are happy (connected to لِكَيْلَا - so that you all do not)
he gave you all (object of تَأْسَوْا۟)
And Allah (as the doer of يُحِبُّ - loves)
arrogant, self-admiring (describing someone Allah does not love)
a boastful person (described with مُخْتَالٍ/arrogant in this ayah)
those who (subject of يَبْخَلُونَ - they withhold)
they withhold/are withholding (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)
and they order/command (the people with stinginess)
the people (as object of يَأْمُرُونَ - they command)
with stinginess (related to يَبْخَلُونَ - they are stingy)
he turns away (after وَمَن - and whoever)
then indeed (connects to يَتَوَلَّ - turns away)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
The Completely Self-Sufficient (a name of Allah describing Him in this ayah)
and we sent down (connected to أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
with them (referring to الرُسُل - the messengers)
the book (object of أَنزَلْنَا - We sent down)
so that he stands (purpose for sending messengers)
with/by justice (related to لِيَقُومَ - so that they may establish)
the iron (object of أَنزَلْنَا - We sent down)
a mighty force (describing the iron mentioned in the ayah)
and benefits/advantages (connected to بَأْسٌ شَدِيدٌ - mighty strength)
and in order that he knows/learns (purpose of أَنزَلْنَا)
helps/supports him (object of يَعْلَمَ - to know)
by/through the unseen realm (object of بِ)
indeed/verily (emphasizing that اللَّهَ is قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ)
Allah (as the object of يَعْلَمَ - knows)
Noah (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
and Abraham (the prophet, as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا)
offspring/descendants of them both (referring to Noah and Abraham)
and the book (object of جَعَلْنَا/We placed)
then from them (referring to the offspring mentioned before)
and many (as the subject of فٰسِقُونَ)
from them (referring to the offspring mentioned in ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا)
those who depart from obedience (nominative plural)
then (connects this part to what came before)
the Gospel (object of وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ - and We gave him)
and mercy (object of جَعَلْنَا - we placed)
they invented it (referring to رَهْبَانِيَّةً - monasticism)
except (negating what came before in مَا كَتَبْنٰهَا)
and then what/so what (connects to رَعَوْهَا - they observed it)
they cared for/tended it (referring to رَهْبَانِيَّةً/monasticism)
it was truly/properly (done) (referring to رِعَايَتِهَا - its observance)
from them (referring to those who believed)
those who (refers to believers being addressed)
they believed strongly (addressing the believers in this ayah)
Allah (as the object of اتَّقُوا - fear/be mindful of)
he gives/will give you all (referring to the believers addressed in يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
two portions (object of يُؤْتِكُمْ - He will give you)
and he makes/sets (for لَّكُمْ نُورًا - a light for you)
a light (object of يَجْعَل - what Allah makes)
you (all) walk (in the light that Allah gives you)
with it/by means of it (referring to نُورًا - the light mentioned earlier)
for/to you all (receivers of نُورًا - a light)
and Allah (as the subject of يَغْفِرْ - forgives)
Most Forgiving (as an attribute of Allah)
that he knows (after لِئَلَّا - so that not)
they are able (to do something from فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's favor)
from (connects فَضْلِ to what comes before it)
and that (connects this emphasized statement to what came before)
the favor (object of يَقْدِرُونَ - they are capable of)
he wills/wants (subject of يُؤْتِيهِ - He gives it)
